content.question: What are the implementation transition costs (teacher displacement, school closures, cohort overlap, curriculum revision, political friction) that would be incurred by any major Hungarian structural reorganization, and do these costs differ by direction of reform (toward more or less selection)?
content.reduction_path: Detailed modeling of capacity overlaps using enrollment projections for at least three years pre- and post-reform; fiscal and labor impact assessment from Ministry of Education and teachers' union; staged pilots with measurement of concrete transition metrics (placement delays, teacher job transitions, overcrowding indicators)
